business.name: Dover Septic Tank Cleaning
business.tagline: When you need us, we show up

hero.headline: When your septic *backs up*, we show up
hero.subheadline: Rock Hill's septic team that answers the phone — even on Sundays and holidays.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Septic Problems Fixed Right
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency repairs — we handle it all

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Complete tank cleaning and waste removal. We pump it clean and leave your system running smooth.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: Backups, overflows, and system failures. We show up fast when everything goes wrong.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Full septic system evaluation and maintenance checks. Know what's happening before problems start.

services.title: Drain Field Service
services.description: Drain field repairs and replacements when your system won't drain properly.

about.heading: Rock Hill Septic Service
about.body: We're the septic team Rock Hill calls when things get messy. Real people answering the phone, not a call center.

reviews.name: Alan H.
reviews.text: When you need them, you NEED them. Dover was very quick to respond, showed up on time, and did the job as quoted. Others didn't even return my calls.

reviews.name: Debbie D.
reviews.text: Super fast service on a Sunday! James and his son were the sweetest gentlemen. Took care of the problem quickly.

reviews.name: Jennifer W.
reviews.text: Showed up on Labor Day, reasonably priced, quick and efficient. They worked with our schedule perfectly.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where We Work
service_areas.subheading: Septic service throughout Rock Hill and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Septic Emergency? We're Ready.
cta.body: Don't wait for it to get worse. Call now for fast septic service that shows up when promised.
